scope_of_work: Providing recruitment and staffing services in IT and Non-IT sectors
Sourcing manpower based on client requirements
Providing candidate resumes with required skills and experience
Supporting placements across management levels (junior, middle, senior)

client_responsibilities: Provide skill requirements and experience criteria
Define number of positions and timelines
vendor_responsibilities: Highlight technical skills, experience, personality and communication skills
Respond to requirements within 3 business days
selection_process: Client provides feedback within 3 business days
Client conducts interviews within 1 week of shortlisting
Final selection decision communicated within 2 business days

conditions: Replacement provided if candidate leaves within 60 days
Vendor not responsible for termination decisions by client

pricing_terms.payment_terms: Payment within 30 days from invoice date

confidentiality_terms: All agreement information must be kept confidential
No disclosure without written consent of client
No use of client name for publicity without permission
Protection of client intellectual property (copyright, trademark, etc.)
legal_conditions: Agreement binding only if authorized and signed by both parties
No disclosure of agreement in publications
Confidential handling of all data and processes
key_strengths: Multi-level hiring capability (junior to senior roles)
raw_text_summary: Agreement for providing recruitment and staffing services to CueLogic Technologies India Pvt. Ltd.
Aarvi Encon will source candidates based on client requirements and respond within 3 business days.
Client will conduct interviews and provide feedback within defined timelines.
Fee structure is based on candidate experience and payable within 30 days.
